description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chest of drawers with a dark, almost black finish. The front features six evenly sized drawers arranged in two columns and three rows, each equipped with a sleek, horizontal metallic bar pull handle. The sides and back are plain, with no visible embellishments or hardware, emphasizing a minimalist design. The chest sits on small, unobtrusive feet that slightly elevate it from the ground. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from engineered wood or MDF with a laminate or veneer finish. This piece is functional and would be suitable for storage in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A sleek, dark-finished chest of drawers with six drawers and metallic bar handles, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat surface with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying six drawers with metallic bar handles arranged in two columns and three rows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain, featureless side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with no visible hardware or features.
